Health Care for All
Health Care for All (HCFA) helps Ventura County families access health care services by helping them apply for health coverage. Our trained Certified Application Assistors help individuals at no charge, apply for Medi-Cal, Covered California and other low-cost insurance programs. We make the insurance enrollment and renewal process easier to access and understand. This program is funded through Maternal, Child, and Adolescent Health (MCAH).
For more information, contact: Ventura County Public Health at (805) 981-5212 or (866) 481-7674.
ALL CHILDREN (0-18) AND YOUNG ADULT MEDI-CAL EXPANSION PROGRAM (AGES 19-26)
All Children and Young Adult Medi-Cal Expansion Program provides youth (0-18) and young adults ages 19-26 with Medi-Cal Coverage regardless of legal/immigration status as long as they meet income eligibility requirements. If your child is 0-26 years of age, they are eligible for health coverage. Children/young adults may also be enrolled in CHDP or CCS.
OLDER ADULT EXPANSION (AGES 50 AND OLDER)
As of May 1, 2022, California law gave access to full-scope Medi–Cal to adults 50 years of age or older, regardless of immigration status. All other Medi-Cal eligibility rules, including income limits, will still apply.
ADULT EXPANISION (AGES 26-49)
Beginning January 1, 2024, a new law in California will allow adults ages 26 through 49 to qualify for full-scope Medi-Cal, regardless of immigration status. All other Medi-Cal eligibility rules, including income limits, will still apply.
CHILDREN, YOUNG ADULTS AND OLDER ADULT MEDI-CAL EXPANSION PROGRAM ENROLLMENT INFORMATION:
To make an appointment, call (805) 981-5212 or (866) 481-7674.

Translation Disclaimer
The hca.venturacounty.gov website has been translated for your convenience using translation software powered by Google Translate. Reasonable efforts have been made to provide an accurate translation, however, no automated translation is perfect nor is it intended to replace human translators. Translations are provided as a service to users of the hca.venturacounty.gov website, and are provided “as is.” No warranty of any kind, either expressed or implied, is made as to the accuracy, reliability, or correctness of any translations made from English into any other language. Some content (such as images, videos, Flash, etc.) may not be accurately translated due to the limitations of the translation software.
The official text is the English version of the website. Any discrepancies or differences created in the translation are not binding and have no legal effect for compliance or enforcement purposes. If any questions arise related to the accuracy of the information contained in the translated website, please refer to the English version of the website which is the official version.
